profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your profile and security settings in Alcatraz.

identity.title: IDENTITY SETTINGS
identity.successDesc: Your identity changes have been saved successfully.

management.title: DATA MANAGEMENT
management.exportSuccessDesc: Your local backup has been downloaded successfully.

danger.title: Risk Zone
danger.desc: Account deletion is irreversible. All encrypted assets will be permanently purged from the server.
danger.modalDesc: This action is irreversible and will permanently purge all your assets. The node will cease activity immediately.

modals.exportAuth: Node authorization is required to decrypt and export the local vault.

2fa.title: 2FA Verification
2fa.backupHelp: Enter one of your 8-character backup codes
2fa.totpHelp: Enter the 6-digit code from your app

setup.title: Enable 2FA
setup.desc: Add an extra layer of security. You will need an app like Google Authenticator or Authy to generate codes.
setup.important: IMPORTANT: Save these backup codes. They are the only way to access if you lose your device.

hero.title: Your secrets under
hero.desc: Like the world's most secure prison, Alcatraz protects your passwords and notes with military-grade encryption. No one enters, no one leaves without your authorization.

features.title: Everything you need to stay safe
features.desc: Features designed to protect your most valuable information

manager.title: Password Manager
manager.desc: Store and generate secure passwords with a single click. Smart autofill across all your websites.

notes.title: Encrypted Notes
notes.desc: Save sensitive information like card numbers, codes, and documents with end-to-end encryption.

multiplatform.title: Multiplatform
multiplatform.desc: Access from iOS, Android, Windows, Mac, and Linux. Instant synchronization.

backup.title: Automatic Backup
backup.desc: Encrypted automatic cloud backup. Never lose your information.

biometric.title: Biometric Authentication
biometric.desc: Unlock with fingerprint or face recognition. Hassle-free security.

audit.title: Security Audit
audit.desc: Analyze the strength of your passwords and receive alerts of known breaches.

security.title: Security at every step
security.desc: Your privacy is our priority. We implement the highest security standards.

featured.title: End-to-End Encryption
featured.desc: We use AES-256 encryption, the same standard used by banks and governments. Your data is encrypted on your device before being sent to the cloud.
list: AES-256 encryption at rest and in transit

zeroKnowledge.title: Zero-Knowledge Architecture
zeroKnowledge.desc: Not even we can see your data. Only you have access to your information.

infrastructure.title: Secure Infrastructure
infrastructure.desc: Certified data centers with 24/7 monitoring and regular audits.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.desc: Total transparency: our code is audited by the community.

cta.title: Start protecting your data today
cta.desc: Join over 100,000 users. Free 30-day trial, no card required.

pricing.title: Plans and Pricing
pricing.desc: Choose the security that best fits your needs.

free.name: Personal
free.desc: For individuals looking for essential security.

family.name: Family
family.desc: Protection for your whole family (up to 6 users).

login.title: Login
login.desc: Welcome back. We protect your data with maximum security.

meta.desc: Access your secure vault for passwords and encrypted notes in Alcatraz.

register.title: Create Account
register.desc: Join Alcatraz and secure your digital life today.

meta.desc: Create your Alcatraz account to manage your passwords securely.
